Name: PreloaderNotInstalled
ZHCN: ⚠ 未检测到星环patch补丁！请检查您是否正确安装了星环mod。
ENUS: ⚠ OrbitalRing Preloader patch has not been detected, please check your installation, make sure you followed installation instructions correctly.

Name: ProjectOrbitalRingNotLoaded
ZHCN: ⚠ 星环mod加载失败！请检查您是否正确安装了星环mod。
ENUS: ⚠ OrbitalRing has not been loaded, please check your installation, make sure you followed installation instructions correctly.

Name: OrbitalRingLoadMessage
ZHCN:
⚠警告，本MOD为以创世之书为基础修改的MOD，还未完成，若您不以测试为目标，请立刻退出。
若您在主界面中看到了创世之书的图标、无红字报错，且科技树与原版不同，说明MOD已成功加载，图标还未替换完成，看到创世之书是正常现象。
请注意，本MOD修改了大量原版内容，因此禁用了上传银河系的功能。
如果您在游玩MOD时遇到了任何问题，或者有宝贵的意见或建议，欢迎加入MOD交流群
ENUS:
⚠Warning, this MOD is modified based on the Book of Genesis and is not yet completed. If you do not intend to test it, please exit immediately. If you see the icon of the Book of Genesis in the main interface, with no red error message, and the technology tree is different from the original version, it means that the MOD has been successfully loaded and the icon has not been replaced yet. It is normal to see the Book of Genesis. 
Please note that this mode modifies a lot of content, and you cannot upload the data the galaxy. 
If have any issues or ideas about the mod, please join our community on Discord.

Name: BepinExVersionNotMatch
ZHCN: ⚠ BepinEx版本不为5.4.17！这会导致许多不可预知的Bug。
ENUS: ⚠ BepinEx version is not 5.4.17! This leads to many unpredictable bugs.

Name: 右键点击：将其设置为原材料
ZHCN: 右键点击：将其设置为原材料
ENUS: Right click: set it to raw material

Name: 左键点击：更换生产设备
ZHCN: 左键点击：更换生产设备

Name: 左键点击：调整增产策略
ZHCN: 左键点击：调整增产策略

Name: 可采集多配方物品
ZHCN: 可采集物品、可调整配方

Name: ShowMessageBox
ZHCN: 显示创世之书加载弹窗

Name: ProductOverflowAdditionalText
ZHCN: （选择是否将配方停止生产的条件由单产物堆积改为所有产物均堆积）
ENUS: (Whether to change the condition for stopping production of some recipes from single product pile up to all product pile up)

Name: UseLDBToolCacheAdditionalText
ZHCN: （可在配置文件中手动修改冲突的MOD物品ID，但启动速度减慢，需要重启游戏才可生效）
ENUS: (Allow manually modify the conflicting MOD item ID in the configuration file, but the startup speed is slowed down, need to restart the game to take effect)

Name: ShowMessageBoxAdditionalText
ZHCN: （在MOD加载完成后禁用弹窗显示星环的额外信息）
ENUS: (Show messagebox about additional information after OrbitalRing mod loaded)

Name: 默认设置
ZHCN: 仅对部分配方启用（已在配方介绍中注明）
ENUS: Enabled for some recipes only (noted in recipe introduction)

Name: 选择星球倾向描述
ZHCN: 选择此星球的规划重点，不同的重点会影响星球的发展方向。
ENUS: Select the focus of this planet, different focuses will affect the development of the planet.

Name: 生态温室执行配方自动增产
ZHCN: 生态温室执行配方自动增产
ENUS: Ecological greenhouses executes formula to automatically increase production

Name: 可以从树木采集种子和本土菌种
ZHCN: 可以从树木采集种子和本土菌种
ENUS: Seeds and native bacterial strains can be collected from trees

Name: 所有需要水的生产建筑水自动填满
ZHCN: 所有需要水的生产建筑水自动填满
ENUS: All production buildings that require water are automatically filled with water

Name: 手动砍树或挖石头有概率掉落隐藏以解锁隐藏科技
ZHCN: 手动砍树或挖石头有概率掉落隐藏以解锁隐藏科技
ENUS: Manually cutting down trees or digging stones has a chance of falling and hiding to unlock hidden technology

Name: 伺服器需要的能耗-50%
ENUS: The energy consumption required by the server is -50%

Name: 快速开局描述
ZHCN: 解锁额外科技，并提供额外的初始物品
ENUS: Unlocks additional techs and provides additional items at the beginning

ENUS: The mecha does not have enough energy to Quantum Navigation

ZHCN: 机甲背包负熵奇点数量不足，无法折跃

ZHCN: 在无氧大气层中只能使用燃料棒发电
ENUS: Can only use fuel rods to generate power in anoxic atmosphere
